sourceWarning: 2Fifty publishes a restaurant-issued item list for selected allergens and a general kitchen cross-contact warning, but not a complete matrix. Positive signals are limited to that guide or explicit current menu text; gluten is not automatically relabeled as wheat, coconut is not treated as tree nut, and no negative safety claim is inferred.

items.name: American Wagyu Brisket
items.description: Snake River Farms American Wagyu. Carefully trimmed briskets with high marbling and seasoned with our own rub developed without any artificial ingredients.
items.ingredientsText: Snake River Farms American Wagyu. Carefully trimmed briskets with high marbling and seasoned with our own rub developed without any artificial ingredients.

items.name: Beef Ribs
items.description: Smoked low and slow. Ethically sourced and heavily seasoned with our own signature rub. Each beef rib bone is a foot long and about 1lb of meat!
items.ingredientsText: Smoked low and slow. Ethically sourced and heavily seasoned with our own signature rub. Each beef rib bone is a foot long and about 1lb of meat!

items.description: Skinless leg & thigh jumbo smoked chicken
items.ingredientsText: Skinless leg & thigh jumbo smoked chicken

items.name: Poblano Sausage Link
items.description: Made with authentic poblanos chiles. Beef only, no cheese. Curated spices infuse a balanced, mild spiciness flavor that payes homage to the great Texas sausage-makers. Price for one link.
items.ingredientsText: Made with authentic poblanos chiles. Beef only, no cheese. Curated spices infuse a balanced, mild spiciness flavor that payes homage to the great Texas sausage-makers. Price for one link.

items.name: Pork Spare Ribs
items.description: Half a pound of Pork spare Ribs (aprox. 2 bones) seasoned with over a dozen spices then smoked for an average of 5 hours.
items.ingredientsText: Half a pound of Pork spare Ribs (aprox. 2 bones) seasoned with over a dozen spices then smoked for an average of 5 hours.

items.name: Prime Brisket
items.description: Ethically sourced Prime grade beef brisket from Creekstone Farms. Smoked low and slow using oak wood without the intervention of gas or electricity.
items.ingredientsText: Ethically sourced Prime grade beef brisket from Creekstone Farms. Smoked low and slow using oak wood without the intervention of gas or electricity.

items.name: Pulled Lamb
items.description: Bone in lamb shoulder heavily smoked until tenderness. Pulled and seasoned with 6 herbs including Rosemary from our edible garden. Served with pickled radish and freshly made purple corn tortillas.
items.ingredientsText: Bone in lamb shoulder heavily smoked until tenderness. Pulled and seasoned with 6 herbs including Rosemary from our edible garden. Served with pickled radish and freshly made purple corn tortillas.

items.name: Spicy Cheddar Sausage Link
items.description: Made in-house. Mix of beef and pork and a multilayered selected spices that blend into a semi-melted cheddar cheese. Snappy and flavorful. Level of spiciness: 🌶🌶🌶 Price for one link
items.ingredientsText: Made in-house. Mix of beef and pork and a multilayered selected spices that blend into a semi-melted cheddar cheese. Snappy and flavorful. Level of spiciness: 🌶🌶🌶 Price for one link

items.name: Whole Wagyu Brisket (warm)
items.description: 6-7lb Top Quality Gold Label American Wagyu Brisket from Snakeriver Farms. Antibiotic and hormones free. Gluten Free. Seasoned with salt, pepper only. Smoked with 100% oak wood. They are fully cooked! We add reheating instructions with your purchase, barbecue sauce and pickles & onions. It’s fully cooked, but packed and chilled. We will provide guidance on how to slice it to maximize its flavor!

items.name: Chocolate Chip Cookie
items.description: Brown Butter Chocolate Chip Cookies Our signature cookies take the classic chocolate chip to the next level. Made with rich, nutty brown butter, each cookie is soft in the center with perfectly crisp edges. Every bite delivers deep caramel notes balanced with just the right amount of chocolate for a truly indulgent treat. Simple ingredients, perfected by fire and tradition.

Every bite delivers deep caramel notes balanced with just the right amount of chocolate for a truly indulgent treat. Simple ingredients, perfected by fire and tradition.

items.description: Fresh, crisp, sustainably made with estate fruit from Abruzzo, Italy. This vegan Pinot Grigio is fermented cool in stainless steel and bottled under screw cap to preserve lively aromas. Expect clean citrus and floral notes, with a bright, easy‑drinking character.

items.description: Size: 187mL Alcohol by vol: 10.8% Lakewoods Candeo is lightly fruity, on the verge of dry. Edgy. Scintillating. Fun!
items.ingredientsText: Size: 187mL Alcohol by vol: 10.8% Lakewoods Candeo is lightly fruity, on the verge of dry. Edgy. Scintillating. Fun!

items.name: Laurence et Rémi Dufaitre Beaujolais-Villages Nouveau wine bottle 2025
items.description: Rémi Dufaitre is a natural winemaker known for his 'Cru' Beaujolais from the great terroirs of Brouilly and Côte de Brouilly. His wines are eagerly snapped up by those in the know and we consider ourselves very fortunate to get a small allocation of his wines every vintage. Rémi's nouveau comes from 50yr old Gamay vines in Beaujolais-Villages on steep hillside vineyards. Fermented naturally and racked off into concrete tanks. Remi's nouveau is always a delight to drink; light and playful with buoyant red fruits (wild raspberry and strawberry usually come to mind), and piquant acidity.
items.ingredientsText: Rémi Dufaitre is a natural winemaker known for his 'Cru' Beaujolais from the great terroirs of Brouilly and Côte de Brouilly. His wines are eagerly snapped up by those in the know and we consider ourselves very fortunate to get a small allocation of his wines every vintage. Rémi's nouveau comes from 50yr old Gamay vines in Beaujolais-Villages on steep hillside vineyards. Fermented naturally and racked off into concrete tanks. Remi's nouveau is always a delight to drink; light and playful with buoyant red fruits (wild raspberry and strawberry usually come to mind), and piquant acidity.

items.ingredientsText: ABV 13.5% Red Wine from Umbria, Italy. Aged in stainless steel. Woman owned winery!

items.name: Petit Cochon Bronzé Rosé 13 % ABV
items.description: Bright berry fruit, a hint of white peach, and a salty, crisp acidity that makes it a perfect wine.
items.ingredientsText: Bright berry fruit, a hint of white peach, and a salty, crisp acidity that makes it a perfect wine.

items.name: Sommelier's Wine Bundle
items.description: This curated bundle brings together four versatile, crowd-pleasing wines perfect for holiday gatherings: 1 Sparkling – Crisp, dry cava with bright citrus and fine bubbles to kick things off 1 Rosé – Fresh, juicy, and easy-drinking with vibrant red fruit notes 2 Chilled Reds – Light-bodied, fruit-forward reds served slightly chilled for maximum freshness and drinkability These wines are all about balance, brightness, and pairing effortlessly with a full holiday spread—from appetizers to mains. Bonus: Choose your own fifth bottle on us—your pick, complimentary.
items.ingredientsText: This curated bundle brings together four versatile, crowd-pleasing wines perfect for holiday gatherings: 1 Sparkling – Crisp, dry cava with bright citrus and fine bubbles to kick things off 1 Rosé – Fresh, juicy, and easy-drinking with vibrant red fruit notes 2 Chilled Reds – Light-bodied, fruit-forward reds served slightly chilled for maximum freshness and drinkability These wines are all about balance, brightness, and pairing effortlessly with a full holiday spread—from appetizers to mains. Bonus: Choose your own fifth bottle on us—your pick, complimentary.

items.name: Viña Zorzal, Navarra Garnacha Red wine bottle 2023
items.description: Grape variety — 100% Garnacha Alcohol — 13,5% Ageing — Young wine. From the series of varietal wines, “Comarca histórica” wine, cuvee of four different villages: Corella, Cintrúenigo, Fitero and Lerga.Early harvest, spontaneous fermentation with wild yeasts, soft winemaking, no oak.
items.ingredientsText: Grape variety — 100% Garnacha Alcohol — 13,5% Ageing — Young wine. From the series of varietal wines, “Comarca histórica” wine, cuvee of four different villages: Corella, Cintrúenigo, Fitero and Lerga.Early harvest, spontaneous fermentation with wild yeasts, soft winemaking, no oak.

items.name: Viñátigo Listán Negro bottle
items.description: Listán Negro is a grape that Viñátigo cultivates in the mid-lands, in the north-west of Tenerife. This grape is a native grape variety of the Canary Islands, as it originated from a natural crossing between the grapes Listán Blanco and Negramoll, both brought by Portuguese and Andalusian settlers between the 15th and 18th centuries.The grapes are hand-harvested by mid- September and the wine ages in old barrels for three months. It’s a delightful and juicy red, with aromas of black pepper, dark fruits, and a strong mineral, volcanic character.
items.ingredientsText: Listán Negro is a grape that Viñátigo cultivates in the mid-lands, in the north-west of Tenerife. This grape is a native grape variety of the Canary Islands, as it originated from a natural crossing between the grapes Listán Blanco and Negramoll, both brought by Portuguese and Andalusian settlers between the 15th and 18th centuries.The grapes are hand-harvested by mid- September and the wine ages in old barrels for three months. It’s a delightful and juicy red, with aromas of black pepper, dark fruits, and a strong mineral, volcanic character.

items.name: Wachter Wiesler Bela-Joska Blaufrankisch (Eisenberg)
items.description: Type: Red wine Grape: 100% Blaufränkisch (also known as Lemberger) Region: Eisenberg DAC, Burgenland, Austria Producer: Wachter Wiesler Vintage: 2020 Style & Notes: Medium-bodied with bright acidity and fine minerality Aromas of wild berries, black cherry, herbs, and pepper Aged mostly in large neutral oak, so it’s elegant and pure rather than oaky Known for its balance and earthy, iron-rich character typical of Eisenberg’s slate soils
items.ingredientsText: Type: Red wine Grape: 100% Blaufränkisch (also known as Lemberger) Region: Eisenberg DAC, Burgenland, Austria Producer: Wachter Wiesler Vintage: 2020 Style & Notes: Medium-bodied with bright acidity and fine minerality Aromas of wild berries, black cherry, herbs, and pepper Aged mostly in large neutral oak, so it’s elegant and pure rather than oaky Known for its balance and earthy, iron-rich character typical of Eisenberg’s slate soils

items.name: Zillamina, Alicante Rosé Wine bottle
items.description: Valencia, Spain. Organic / Natural 13% ABV 100% Monastrell. Personality: A brilliant strawberry color. Strawberry and plum aromas. Fresh in the mouth, with tons of fruit, elegant, clean, and pleasing finish.
items.ingredientsText: Valencia, Spain. Organic / Natural 13% ABV 100% Monastrell. Personality: A brilliant strawberry color. Strawberry and plum aromas. Fresh in the mouth, with tons of fruit, elegant, clean, and pleasing finish.
